chat.greetingSubtext: Start a conversation — I'm ready to help with any questions.
chat.inputHint: Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line

memory.title: Memory
memory.confirmForget: Are you sure you want to forget this?

tools.title: Tools
tools.desc_web_search: Search the internet for current information. Use when the user asks about recent events or facts requiring up-to-date data. Returns titles, URLs, and short snippets.
tools.desc_web_fetch: Fetch text content of a web page by URL (lightweight, no browser). Best for static HTML pages, articles, documentation. Does NOT execute JavaScript — use browser for SPAs.
tools.desc_http_request: Send an HTTP request to any URL. Use for calling REST APIs, webhooks, GraphQL, and any HTTP service. Supports all methods, headers, body, and Bearer auth.
tools.desc_browser: Control a headless Chromium browser. Use for JS-heavy sites, SPAs, pages requiring login, or when web_fetch fails. Actions: navigate, screenshot, accessibility tree, click, type.
tools.desc_memory_manage: Manage long-term memory: save facts, preferences, episodes, skills. Use to remember important information about the user.
tools.desc_knowledge_search: Semantic search across the knowledge base and memory. Use to find previously saved facts, episodes, and skills.
tools.desc_system_run: Execute a shell command on the host machine. Returns stdout, stderr, and exit code. Use for system tasks: disk check, file listing, scripts, git, etc.
tools.desc_file_ops: Read, write, search, and manage files on the local filesystem. Actions: read, write, append, list, search, info, mkdir, delete, move, copy, tree.
tools.desc_clipboard: Read from or write to the system clipboard. Actions: read — get contents, write — set text.
tools.desc_notify: Send a notification to the user. Supports macOS desktop notifications and Telegram messages. Use for alerts, reminders, and proactive info delivery.
tools.desc_vision: Capture screenshots or analyze images with AI. Actions: screenshot — capture screen, analyze — analyze an image file.
tools.desc_pdf_read: Extract text and metadata from a PDF file. Supports page range selection and metadata-only mode.
tools.desc_calculator: Evaluate math expressions. Supports arithmetic, functions (sqrt, sin, cos, log, etc.), constants (pi, e), unit conversions, and percentages.
tools.desc_code_exec: Execute code (Python, JavaScript, or TypeScript) and return output. Use for complex calculations, data analysis, algorithm prototyping.
tools.desc_datetime: Get the current date, time, and timezone. Use when you need to know the current time or perform date operations.
tools.desc_audio_transcribe: Transcribe an audio file to text using Whisper. Supports mp3, wav, m4a, ogg, webm.
tools.desc_cron: Manage scheduled tasks. Actions: create (cron/interval/once), list, delete, pause, resume.

settings.title: Settings
settings.braveDesc: Best quality — own index, structured snippets
settings.providerDesc: auto = best available, or pick one explicitly
settings.emailProviderDesc: Select your email provider or 'custom' for manual IMAP/SMTP
settings.emailPasswordDesc: App password (Gmail, Yandex) or regular password
settings.tgClientDesc: Connect to Telegram as a user (MTProto). The agent can read and reply to messages on your behalf.
settings.tgClientApiIdDesc: Get it at my.telegram.org → API development tools
settings.tgClientCodeDesc: Code from Telegram (sent to your app)
settings.tgClient2faDesc: Cloud password (if two-factor auth is enabled)
settings.tgClientMonitoredChatsDesc: Chats where the agent reads and replies to messages
settings.tgClientNoChatsMon: No monitored chats. Add a chat from the dialogs list.
settings.tgClientQrDesc: Open Telegram → Settings → Devices → Link Desktop Device and scan the code
